project.name: KORA
project.mission: Local-first, persistent, inspectable AI system with continuity, companionship, and resourcefulness.

deployment.moto_e15: offload node at moto-e15.tail41b5f8.ts.net — authorized_keys not yet set

pinned_principles: Memory should be inspectable and editable
Extreme resourcefulness is a core trait
Honest self-check — no false 'all systems nominal'
active_goals: Run usable KORA locally without VPS
Keep phone lightweight — offload to Moto E15 when possible
last_session_summary: Repo cleanup and routing inspection. VPS decommissioned. Kora-Lite survival config established on Pixel 6A. _archive/ created for clutter.
open_tasks: Verify kora.py boots cleanly from kora_local
Set authorized_keys on Moto E15 for autonomous offload
Pull one local Ollama model for offline fallback
Wire local/cloud mode toggle into kora.py

now: stabilize kora.py single source of truth
